# apsum_path_center { #astroapers.apsum_path_center }

```python
apsum_path_center(
    data,
    x,
    y,
    segments,
    holes=None,
    *,
    mask=None,
    return_npix=True,
)
```

Return center-selected path aperture sums for one or many centers. Path geometry is limited to closed contours made from ``"line"`` and circular ``"arc"`` commands.
